# Methods {#sec-methods}

This is the second chapter of the book. As discussed in @sec-intro, we now present our methods.

## Section 2.1

Some content in section 2.1. See @tbl-data for sample data.

| Column A | Column B | Column C |
|----------|----------|----------|
| 1        | 2        | 3        |
| 4        | 5        | 6        |

: Sample data table {#tbl-data}

## Section 2.2

Some content in section 2.2. Refer back to @fig-cars and @tbl-data.

## Section 2.3 - Sub-figures

See @fig-panel for a panel of sub-figures, or @fig-panel-a and @fig-panel-b individually.

::: {#fig-panel layout-ncol=2}

![First panel](chapter1_files/figure-typst/fig-cars-1.svg){#fig-panel-a}

![Second panel](chapter1_files/figure-typst/fig-cars-1.svg){#fig-panel-b}

A panel with two sub-figures showing the same plot.
:::
